title: How to get a police certificate – Yemen - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate – Yemen
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
Criminal Status Sheet

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.

### If you are a citizen of Yemen

#### If you live in Yemen
Apply in person at the Office of the Deputy General Director (see Contact information for complete address). You must bring:
- A completed police clearance request form
- Two photographs (4x6 cm) with a white background
- A copy of your valid ID card/passport

#### If you live outside of Yemen
- Return to Yemen and apply in person
- Ask a representative (a friend, relative or colleague) in Yemen, with a power of attorney, to apply on your behalf at the Office of the Deputy General Director (see Contact information for complete address)
- A completed police clearance request form
- Two photographs (4x6 cm) with a white background
- A copy of your valid ID card/passport

### If you are a not a citizen of Yemen

#### If you live in Yemen (for more than 6 months)
Apply in person at the Office of the Deputy General Director (see Contact information for complete address). You must bring:
- The letter from the Embassy of Canada requesting the Criminal Status Sheet
- A completed police clearance request form
- Two photographs (4x6 cm) with a white background
- A copy of your valid passport
- A copy of your valid residence visa for Yemen

#### If you live outside of Yemen (but have lived in Yemen for more than 6 months)
- Return to Yemen and apply in person
- Ask a representative (a friend, relative or colleague) in Yemen, with a power of attorney, to apply on your behalf at the Office of the Deputy General Director (see Contact information for complete address)
- The letter from the Embassy of Canada requesting the Criminal Status Sheet
- A completed police clearance request form
- Two photographs (4x6 cm) with a white background
- A copy of your valid passport
- A copy of all former residence visas for Yemen
Office of the Deputy General Director General Directorate of Criminal Investigations Ministry of Interior Sana’a, Yemen Location: Zahban area, beside Electricity Power plant
